## Swift Blog Carnival — Edition Signup

**Month:** YYYY-MM

### Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated my entry in `data/editions.yml`
- [ ] The `month` field uses `YYYY-MM` format
- [ ] Entries are in reverse chronological order (newest first)
- [ ] I filled in `host.name` and `host.link`
- [ ] I set `status` to `upcoming` (or `open` if ready to accept posts)
- [ ] If publishing a roundup, I set `status` to `published` and added the `roundup` URL

### Notes
<!-- Anything else? Topic ideas, co-host interest, etc. -->
